# releaseInfo

**Instance Property**

An optional pointer to a custom function that’sinvoked when the pattern is released. [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPatternReleaseInfoCallback].

## Declaration

```swift
var releaseInfo: CGPatternReleaseInfoCallback?
```

## Instance Properties

- **drawPattern**: A pointer to a custom function that draws thepattern. For information about this callback function, see [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPatternDrawPatternCallback].
- **version**: The version of the structure passed in as a parameterto the [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPattern/init(info:bounds:matrix:xStep:yStep:tiling:isColored:callbacks:)]. Forthis version of the structure, you should set this value to zero.

items.description: A pointer to a custom function that draws thepattern. For information about this callback function, see [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPatternDrawPatternCallback].
